commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=831e873d3664cf242370eaadf3d1f3067e793d82)
commands.review_summary:
Temporarily widens the Convex schema for deprecated ClawScan values and adds batched internal actions and tests to remove or remap the legacy production data.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source level: current main no longer accepts the deprecated persisted fields or source literal, while the PR explicitly restores them so legacy production rows can be cleaned. No real production-row transcript is attached.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A collaborator-authored destructive production migration needs explicit maintainer approval of the provenance mapping and operator rollout; contributor-supplied real behavior proof is also a human-only merge gate.

target.title: chore: add ClawScan cleanup migration
target.body:
## Summary
- Temporarily re-allow deprecated ClawScan note fields and the old `clawscan-note` scan job source so production can accept a cleanup deploy.
- Add internal maintenance actions to clear `clawScanNote` / `clawScanNoteUpdatedAt` from `packageReleases` and `skillVersions`.
- Add an internal maintenance action to map old `securityScanJobs.source = "clawscan-note"` rows to `manual` so the final narrowed schema can deploy.

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run convex/maintenance.test.ts --testNamePattern "deprecated ClawScan"`
- `bunx vitest run convex/maintenance.test.ts`
- `bunx convex codegen`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:packages`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bunx convex deploy --dry-run --typecheck=disable -y`

## Rollout
1. Merge and deploy this temporary widened schema.
2. Run dry-run/apply cleanup actions for `packageReleases`, `skillVersions`, and `securityScanJobs`.
3. Verify no deprecated data remains.
4. Deploy current `main` narrow schema again.
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
